title: 9 R.I.P. sequel Visual Novel Streams Opening Movie Trailer
content: Idea Factory International revealed the opening movie for the western release of the supernatural visual novel 9 R.I.P. sequel on Thursday. The company also revealed the bonus trading card pack that will be available with the Standard Edition of the game.
author: ANN

title: Observation Records of My Fiancée Anime Reveals English Dub Cast
content: The English dub cast for Observation Records of My Fiancée: The Misadventures of a Self-Proclaimed Villainess includes: • Kelly Greenshield as Bertia • Blake McNamara as Cecil • Donna Xia as Cecil (Child) • Francine Gonzalez as Heronia • Tom Aglio as Zeno • Tom Henry as Lord Noches • Sara Ragsdale as Bird Aaron…

title: Top 7 Funniest Isekai Anime, Ranked
content: The isekai genre has become a fundamental part of the anime landscape, with the genre routinely taking a look at series that drop its protagonists into worlds quite different from the ones they once knew.
author: ComicBook

title: Shoji Kawamori's Labyrinth Anime Film Unveils English Dub Trailer
content: GKIDS began streaming on Friday an English-dubbed trailer and visual for Shōji Kawamori 's original animation film Labyrinth ( Meikyū no Shiori ): The film opened in Japan on January 1. The cast includes: • Atarashii Gakkō!
author: ANN

title: Pokemon: Horizons Shares First Preview For Next Arc
content: The days of Ash Ketchum leading the charge in Pokemon’s anime series have ended, with Liko and Roy acting as the show’s protagonists in Pokemon: Horizons . Throughout the anime adaptation’s history, whether it be led by Ketchum or the new trainers on the block, the series has routinely based its adventures on games…
author: ComicBook

title: Yen Press Licenses 'Full Metal Panic! Family', Two A.M. at the Dining Table, N Manga, More Titles
content: Yen Press announced on Friday that it has licensed six manga and three novel series for release in October. Maria is a gyaru haunted by her mother's ghost, but the spirit who appears before her one night is…a surprisingly cute, young girl who looks like a doll!?
author: ANN

title: Pokémon Horizons Anime's Next 'Wonder Voyage' Arc Premieres on May 22
content: The staff of the Pokémon: Horizons anime announced on Friday that the next arc "Wonder Voyage" will premiere on May 22. The staff unveiled a new visual that centers on Ditto and a new character.
author: ANN

title: Baki’s Wildest Crossover is Teased Following Anime’s Renewal (With a Dragon Ball Veteran)
content: Netflix has found serious success with the Baki: The Grappler franchise, with Baki-Dou: The Invincible Samurai announcing earlier this year that it would be returning with a “Part Two.” The streaming service had also brought Baki and his friends face-to-face with another major anime Netflix franchise via Baki Hanma…
author: ComicBook

title: Tokyo MX Dismisses Representative Director/Chairman Hiroshi Date Following Investigation of Power Harassment
content: The company stated that it is considering strict disciplinary measures for management accountability and creating measures to prevent it from happening again. Tokyo MX currently airs anime such as Botan Kamiina Fully Blossoms When Drunk , Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- , The Angel Next Door Spoils Me Rotten ,…
author: ANN
